refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital kitchen, eating food from a plate. The rodent appears to be accessing food meant for patients or staff.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in the hospital kitchen eating food from a plate. This is completely unacceptable and raises serious concerns about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital. I fear for the health and well-being of patients and staff.
voice_text: There's a rat in the hospital kitchen, eating off a plate, it's disgusting. This is a serious health risk, someone needs to do something about it.
